services.heading: Nyochaa Anwansi Dị N'azụ Omenala Anyị

learnLanguage.title: Mụta Asụsụ
learnLanguage.description: Chọpụta ịma mma nke asụsụ ndị Africa ma jikọọ na omenala dị iche iche n'ofe kọntinent ahụ.

exploreIdentity.title: Nyochaa njirimara na omenala
exploreIdentity.description: Kpughee njem na mmegharị ndị kpụrụ omenala dị iche iche nke Afrika ma jikọta ndị ya site na oge.

streamFolklore.title: Lelee akụkọ ifo, egwu, na akụkọ
streamFolklore.description: Kpughee mgbọrọgwụ nke njirimara Afrika na omenala ebighị ebi ndị a na-enyefe site n'ọgbọ rue n'ọgbọ.

about2.title: Maka Magical Africa
about2.description: Magical Africa na-eme emume ịma mma, omenala, na akụkọ nke Afrika. Anyị na-egosi omenala bara ụba nke kọntinent ahụ, ala dị iche iche, na mmụọ dị ndụ, na-ekekọrịta ihe na-eme Afrika bụrụ nke anwansi n'ezie.

maasaiBracelets.title: Aka ọla Maasai
maasaiBracelets.description: Aka ọla Maasai nwere shanga na-egosipụta omenala na nka.

beadedJewelery.title: Ihe ịchọ mma shanga
beadedJewelery.description: Ihe ịchọ mma nkume emere n'aka nwere ịma mma nke okike.

maasaiNecklaces.title: Olu ọla Maasai
maasaiNecklaces.description: Olu ọla shanga Maasai omenala nwere agba dị ndụ.

ankaraGown.title: Uwe Ankara
ankaraGown.description: Emere ya site na akwa Ankara, a na-eyi ya n'omenala Naịjirịa dị iche iche.

maasaiLeso.title: Leso Maasai
maasaiLeso.description: Ndị nwoke na ndị nwanyị Maasai na-eyi ya na Kenya na Tanzania.

kitenge.title: Kitenge
kitenge.description: Emere ya site na akwa owu nwere usoro dị egwu maka ndị nwoke na ndị nwanyị.

carpentryTools.title: Ngwa ọkpụkpụ osisi
carpentryTools.description: Ngwa ọkpụkpụ osisi nke ndị nka maka ọrụ aka zuru oke.

farmingTools.title: Ngwa ọrụ ugbo
farmingTools.description: Ngwa ọrụ ugbo omenala ka a na-eji taa.

traditionalSpears.title: Ube omenala
traditionalSpears.description: Ube emere n'aka ndị agha ji na akụkọ ihe mere eme.

drums.title: Ịgba
drums.description: Ịgba omenala Afrika maka emume na nnọkọ.

stringInstruments.title: Ngwa egwu eriri
stringInstruments.description: Ngwa egwu eriri emere n'aka nwere ụda pụrụ iche.

windInstruments.title: Ngwa egwu ikuku
windInstruments.description: Opi na mpi omenala emere site na ihe ndị okike.

languages.title: Mụta Asụsụ Anyị Ụfọdụ
languages.description: Afrika bụ ụlọ ọtụtụ puku asụsụ, nke ọ bụla na-eburu akụkọ ihe mere eme, njirimara, na omenala. Nyochaa ekele na okwu ndị a na-ahụkarị site na obodo Afrika dị iche iche ma jikọọ na kọntinent ahụ site na asụsụ.

swahili.name: Swahili
swahili.tooltip: Ekele a na-ahụkarị bụ 'Habari?', pụtara 'Kedu ka ị mere?'

zulu.name: Zulu
zulu.tooltip: Ekele a na-ahụkarị bụ 'Sawubona', pụtara 'Ahụrụ m gị.'

yoruba.name: Yoruba
yoruba.tooltip: 'Báwo ni?' bụ ekele Yoruba pụtara 'Kedu ka ị mere?'

hausa.name: Hausa
hausa.tooltip: 'Akkam?' pụtara 'Kedu ka ị mere?' na Hausa.

igbo.name: Igbo
igbo.tooltip: Ekele a na-ahụkarị bụ 'Kedu?', pụtara 'Kedu ka ị mere?'

tsonga.name: Tsonga
tsonga.tooltip: Ekele a na-ahụkarị bụ 'Avuxeni', pụtara 'Ụtụtụ ọma'

tribes.title: Nyochaa Ebo Anyị
tribes.subtitle: Njem site na ebo dị iche iche nke Afrika na omenala ebighị ebi

oromo.name: Oromo
oromo.description: Ndị Oromo si Ethiopia, na-eburu ihe nketa mpako nke omenala, ịdị n'otu, na njirimara omenala. Ha bụ otu ndị kachasị ukwuu n'obodo ahụ, na-eme ihe dị ka otu ụzọ n'ụzọ atọ nke ndị mmadụ nwere ihe dị ka nde mmadụ 40.

zulu.name: Zulu
zulu.description: Site na South Africa, ndị Zulu na-eburu ihe nketa dị ike nke omenala, nguzosi ike n'oge, na njirimara, na-anọchite anya karịa nde mmadụ 11.

igbo.name: Igbo
igbo.description: Ndị Igbo si Nigeria, bụ otu n'ime ebo kachasị ukwuu n'obodo ahụ, nwere karịa nde 30, a ma ama maka omenala bara ụba, ịzụ ahịa, na ụkpụrụ obodo siri ike.

socialImpact.title: Mmetụta Anyị na Ọha
socialImpact.description: Anyị kwenyere na inye obodo ndị na-akpali anyị ihe. Site na ikpo okwu anyị, anyị na-akwado ndị nka obodo, na-echekwa ihe nketa omenala, ma na-emepụta ohere akụ na ụba n'ofe Afrika.

artisans.title: Ịkwado Ndị Nka Obodo
artisans.description: Anyị na-ejikọ ndị ọrụ nka obodo ozugbo na ahịa ụwa, na-ehụ na ha na-enweta ụgwọ ziri ezi maka ọrụ ha.

heritage.title: Ịchekwa Ihe Nketa
heritage.description: Ebe nchekwa dijitalụ anyị na-enyere aka ịchekwa asụsụ ndị nọ n'ihe ize ndụ, omenala, na omenaala maka ọgbọ ndị na-abịa.

partners.title: Ndị Mmekọ Anyị
partners.description: Anyị na-arụkọ ọrụ na nzukọ ndị na-ekekọrịta ọhụụ anyị nke ịchekwa na ime emume omenala Afrika. Ọnụ, anyị na-eme mmetụta karịa.

faq.title: Ajụjụ A Na-ajụkarị
faq.subtitle2: Nweta azịza na ajụjụ ndị a na-ajụkarị banyere Africa

whatIs.question: Gịnị bụ Magical Africa?
whatIs.answer: Magical Africa bụ ikpo okwu raara nye ichekwa, ime emume, na ikekọrịta ihe nketa omenala bara ụba nke Afrika na ụwa. Anyị na-ejikọ ndị mmadụ na omenala Afrika n'ezie, asụsụ, omenala, na obodo.

contribute.question: Kedu ka m ga-esi tinye aka na Magical Africa?
contribute.answer: Ị nwere ike itinye aka site na ikekọrịta akụkọ, foto, ma ọ bụ ihe ọmụma gbasara obodo gị. Debanye aha ma jiri ngwa onyinye anyị tinye ọdịnaya gbasara omenala, asụsụ, na ihe nketa nke ebo gị.

authentic.question: Ọdịnaya dị na Magical Africa ọ bụ nke eziokwu?
authentic.answer: Ee! A na-enweta ọdịnaya anyị niile ozugbo site n'aka ndị otu obodo na ndị ọkachamara omenala. Anyị na-arụkọ ọrụ chiri anya na obodo ndị obodo iji hụ na ihe niile anyị na-ekekọrịta ziri ezi ma bụrụ nke eziokwu.

learnLanguage.question: Kedu ka m ga-esi mụta asụsụ Afrika na ikpo okwu a?
learnLanguage.answer: Anyị na-enye ihe eji amụ asụsụ gụnyere okwu a na-ahụkarị, mkpọ ụda sitere n'aka ndị na-asụ asụsụ ọmụmụ, na ọnọdụ omenala iji nyere gị aka ghọta ma kwanyere asụsụ ndị Africa ùgwù.

purchase.question: Enwere m ike ịzụta ngwaahịa Afrika n'ezie?
purchase.answer: Ee! Ahịa anyị nwere ngwaahịa omenala ndị a kpụrụ n'aka ndị nka Africa. Ọzụzụ ọ bụla na-akwado obodo ndị obodo ma na-enyere aka ịchekwa ọrụ aka omenala.

contact.description: Ị nwere ajụjụ gbasara omenala Afrika, ihe nketa, ma ọ bụ mkpokọta anyị? Kpọtụrụ anyị ma chọpụta akụkọ, omenala, na ike ịmepụta ihe ndị na-eme Afrika pụrụ iche. Anyị ga-enwe mmasị ijikọ na gị ma kesaa anwansi nke Afrika.

auth.orBecomeMember: Ma ọ bụ Bụrụ Onye Otu
auth.joinTextEnd: ma chọpụta omenala Afrika, ihe nketa, akụkọ, na omenala.
auth.googleSuccess: Ị banyere na Google nke ọma!

explore.title: Nyochaa Afrika N'ezie
explore.description: Chọpụta omenala bara ụba, omenala, na akụkọ site na kọntinent niile n'otu ebe.

connect.title: Jikọọ Na Ihe Nketa
connect.description: Nwee ahụmahụ Afrika site na ndị ya, ebo, na omenala ebighị ebi, a họpụtara nke ọma.

travel.title: Njem Gafere Nke A Na-ahụkarị
travel.description: Meghee ebe pụrụ iche na ahụmahụ omenala ndị gafere ụzọ ndị njem a na-ahụkarị.

errors.noAccount: Ọ dịghị akaụntụ hụrụ na email a
errors.invalidCredential: Email ma ọ bụ okwuntụghe ezighi ezi
errors.invalidEmail: Biko tinye adreesị email ziri ezi

hero.title: Nyochaa Obodo Afrika
hero.subtitle: Chọpụta ọtụtụ omenala dị iche iche, omenala, na ihe nketa nke Afrika n'ofe kọntinent.

section.title: Obodo Afrika
section.subtitle: Nyochaa omenala dị iche iche, omenala, na akụkọ nke obodo Afrika site na kọntinent niile.

contribute.title: Obodo Gị Ọ Nọghị?
contribute.description: Nyere anyị aka ịchekwa na ikekọrịta omenala gị. Tinye akụkọ ebo gị, omenala, asụsụ, na ihe nketa na Magical.Africa.

maasai.name: Maasai
maasai.desc: Ndị agha na-akwaga akwaga a maara maka omenala na uwe pụrụ iche.

ashanti.name: Ashanti
ashanti.desc: A maara ha maka ọrụ aka ọla edo ha na Alaeze Ashanti dị ike.

hausa.name: Hausa
hausa.desc: Otu n'ime ebo kachasị ukwuu na Afrika, a maara ha maka azụmaahịa.

zulu.name: Zulu
zulu.desc: A maara ha maka omenala agha, ịkpụ shanga, na Alaeze Zulu a ma ama.

yoruba.name: Yoruba
yoruba.desc: Bara ụba na mythology, nka, na obodo ochie dị ka Ife na Oyo.

kikuyu.name: Kikuyu
kikuyu.desc: Ebo kachasị ukwuu na Kenya, a maara ha maka ọrụ ugbo na azụmaahịa.

igbo.name: Igbo
igbo.desc: A maara ha maka mmụọ azụmaahịa na omenala nka bara ụba n'ọgbọ niile.

amhara.name: Amhara
amhara.desc: Otu dị ike n'akụkọ ihe mere eme na Ethiopia nwere ihe nketa Ndị Kraịst ochie.

berber.name: Berber
berber.desc: Ndị mbụ nke North Africa nwere omenala na asụsụ ochie.

swahili.name: Swahili
swahili.desc: Ndị mmiri a maara maka azụmaahịa osimiri ha na njikọ omenala kemgbe narị afọ.

wolof.name: Wolof
wolof.desc: Ebo dị ike na Senegal a maara maka nnabata na ịdị n'otu ha.

fulani.name: Fulani
fulani.desc: Ndị ọzụzụ anụ na-akwaga akwaga gbasara West Africa nwere omenala pụrụ iche.

history.title: Akụkọ Ihe Mere Eme na Nkwaga
history.p1: Ndị Maasai bụ ebo Nilotic bi n'ugwu, etiti na ndịda Kenya na ugwu Tanzania. Ha bụ n'ime ndị obodo a ma ama n'ụwa niile n'ihi obibi ha nso ọtụtụ ogige anụ ọhịa nke Nnukwu Ọdọ Mmiri Afrika na omenaala na uwe ha pụrụ iche.
history.p2: Ndị Maasai na-asụ asụsụ Maa, onye otu ezinụlọ asụsụ Nilotic nwere njikọ na Dinka na Nuer. A ma ha maka omenala ha pụrụ iche, omenaala, na uwe, yana aha ha dị ka ndị agha siri ike na ndị na-azụ ehi. Ndị Maasai edoziela ọtụtụ n'ime ndụ omenala ha n'agbanyeghị nrụgide sitere na mmepe oge a.

identity.title: Njirimara na Ụdị Ndụ
identity.description: Ndị Maasai bụ ndị ọzụzụ anụ na-akwaga akwaga ndị dabere n'omenala na ehi, atụrụ, na ewu maka ndụ ha. Ehi nwere uru pụrụ iche n'omenala Maasai, na-anọchi anya akụ, ọnọdụ, na nri. Ndị Maasai na-atụ akụ nwoke site n'ọnụ ọgụgụ ehi na ụmụ o nwere.

language.title: Asụsụ
language.description: Asụsụ Maa bụ asụsụ omenala nke ndị Maasai nke East Africa. A na-asụ ya karịsịa na Kenya na ugwu Tanzania, ọ bụkwa nke ezinụlọ asụsụ Nilotic. Maa abụghị naanị ụzọ nkwurịta okwu — ọ na-arụ ọrụ dị mkpa n'ịchekwa omenala Maasai, njirimara, na omenaala ọnụ.

audio.title: Gee Ekele Omenala
audio.description: Mụta mkpọpụta Maa n'ezie ozugbo site n'aka ndị na-asụ asụsụ izizi, na-echekwa ụda eziokwu, usoro, na nkọwa omenala nke asụsụ Maasai.

clothing.title: Uwe na Ịchọ Mma Omenala
clothing.description: A ma ndị Maasai maka uwe ha pụrụ iche nke uhie a na-akpọ "shuka." Uhie bụ agba kachasị mkpa, na-egosi ịdị ike, ịdị n'otu, na ọbara. Ma ụmụ nwoke ma ụmụ nwanyị na-eyi ihe ịchọ mma shanga pụrụ iche, agba dị iche iche na usoro na-egosi afọ, ọnọdụ alụmdi na nwunye, na ọnọdụ ọha mmadụ.

eunoto.title: Eunoto
eunoto.desc: Emume ịbịaru okenye ebe ndị agha na-agbanwe ka ọ bụrụ ndị okenye obere

enkipaata.title: Enkipaata
enkipaata.desc: Emume tupu obibi maka ụmụ nwoke

emuratare.title: Emuratare
emuratare.desc: Emume obibi na-egosi mgbanwe gaa n'ọnọdụ agha

enkang.title: Enkang oo-nkiri
enkang.desc: Emume alụmdi na nwunye nwere ngọzi omenala

olngesherr.title: Olngesherr
olngesherr.desc: Emume alụmdi na nwunye nwere ngọzi omenala

nyamaChoma.title: Nyama Choma
nyamaChoma.desc: Anụ a hụrụ, karịsịa ewu na ehi

olpurda.title: Olpurda
olpurda.desc: Ofe e ji anụ, ọkpụkpụ, na ahịhịa mee

leaders.title: Ndị Ndu A Ma Ama Nke Gara Aga na Ugbu A

laibonLenana.name: Laibon Lenana
laibonLenana.desc: Onye ndu ime mmụọ Maasai siri ike bụ onye rụrụ ọrụ dị mkpa n'oge ịchịisi Britain.

olonana.name: Olonana
olonana.desc: Onyeisi na Laibon bụ onye kparịtara ụkpụrụ iji chebe ala Maasai.

mbatian.name: Mbatian
mbatian.desc: Laibon a ma ama karịsịa, a ma ya maka amụma ya na ịchịkọta ndị Maasai.

oleSaibul.name: Ole Saibul
oleSaibul.desc: Onye ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị Maasai a ma ama na onye na-akwado ikike ndị ọzụzụ anụ na Kenya.

oleNtimama.name: William Ole Ntimama
oleNtimama.desc: Onye ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị Kenya bụ onye kwadoro ikike ala Maasai ruo ọtụtụ afọ iri.

oleLenku.name: Joseph Ole Lenku
oleLenku.desc: Gọvanọ ugbu a nke Kajiado County na onye bụbu Akwụkwọ Nchịkwa.

nature.title: Njikọ na Okike
nature.description: Ndị Maasai ebila n'udo na anụ ọhịa ruo ọtụtụ narị afọ, na-ekekọrịta otu usoro okike ahụ na ọdụm, enyi, na anụ ọhịa ndị ọzọ. Ụdị ndụ ọzụzụ anụ ha na nkwenye omenala enyewo aka ịchekwa nnukwu mpaghara ọzara.

cattle.name: Ehi
cattle.desc: Onyinye nsọ sitere n'aka Enkai (Chineke), dị mkpa maka njirimara na ịdị ndụ Maasai

lions.name: Ọdụm
lions.desc: A na-asọpụrụ ha dị ka ihe ngosi nke ịdị ike; n'akụkọ ihe mere eme a na-achụ nta ha n'oge emume ịbịaru okenye

elephants.name: Enyi
elephants.desc: A na-asọpụrụ ha maka amamihe na ike; a na-echekwa ha site n'ịchekwa omenala

giraffes.name: Ịnyịnya Ibu
giraffes.desc: A na-ele ha anya dị ka ihe dị mma na-ekekọrịta ala ịta nri ha

antiques.title: Ngwa Omenala na Ihe Ochie
antiques.description: Ndị Maasai akpụọla ngwa ọrụ pụrụ iche, ngwa agha, na ihe ịchọ mma ruo ọtụtụ narị afọ. Ngwa ndị a na-anọchi anya akụ omenala ha bara ụba ma na-aga n'ihu ịbụ ihe ngosi nke njirimara na omenala.

rungu.name: Rungu (Osisi Ịtụ)
rungu.desc: Osisi omenala nke ndị agha na-eji echebe na ịchụ nta

shuka.name: Shuka (Akwa Uhie)
shuka.desc: Akwa uhie a ma ama a na-eyi dị ka uwe omenala

beadedJewelry.name: Ihe Ịchọ Mma Shanga
beadedJewelry.desc: Ọrụ shanga siri ike na-anọchi anya ọnọdụ, afọ, na njirimara

spear.name: Ube (Enkudi)
spear.desc: Ihe ngosi nke oke nwoke na ngwa agha bụ isi nke ndị agha Maasai

shield.name: Ọta (Olongu)
shield.desc: Ọta gbara gburugburu a tere mmanụ na usoro pụrụ iche na-anọchi anya njirimara agbụrụ

calabash.name: Ite (Enkukuri)
calabash.desc: Ọkwa ite a na-eji echekwa ngwakọ mmiri ara ehi na ọbara

preserve.title: Nyere Anyị Aka Ịchekwa Akụ Maasai
preserve.description: Ị nwere akụkọ, foto, ma ọ bụ ihe ọmụma ịkekọrịta banyere omenala Maasai?

hero.title: Maka Magical Africa
hero.tagline: Na-echekwa Asụsụ Afrịka. Na-enye ndị obodo ike. Na-ewu ọdịnihu.

background.paragraph1: Magical.africa bụ otu nzukọ Pan-African na-arụ ọrụ n'etiti asụsụ Afrịka, omenala, agụmakwụkwọ, na teknụzụ. Anyị nọ iji kwado iji asụsụ obodo gaa n'ihu, eto eto, na idowe ya n'ofe kọntinent ahụ.
background.paragraph2: Asụsụ Afrịka dị mkpa maka agụmakwụkwọ, ịzụ ndụ, na njikọ ọha na eze, ma ọtụtụ ka na-anọchịghị anya nke ọma na sistemụ gọọmentị na oghere dijitalụ. Magical Africa na-edozi nsogbu a site na usoro lekwasịrị anya n'obodo na mmekọrịta nke na-akpọkọta ndị nwe ihe ọmụma ime obodo, ndị nkụzi, ndị nchọpụta, na ndị mmekọ teknụzụ.
background.paragraph3: Site n'iji teknụzụ dịka ngwá ọrụ enyemaka ọ bụghị nnọchi anyị na-enyere aka ịtinye asụsụ Afrịka na ihe ọmụma omenala n'ime sistemụ ọgbara ọhụrụ n'ụzọ nkwanye ùgwù, gụnyere mmadụ niile, na nke na-adịgide adịgide.

approach.title: Usoro Anyị
approach.description: Anyị na-ejikọ omenala, teknụzụ, na agụmakwụkwọ iji nye ndị obodo ike ma chekwaa ihe nketa Afrịka.

items.sustainableImpact: Ahịa Ngwa Omenala na Ngwaọrụ Afrịka Pụrụ Iche

datastewardship.title: Nlekọta Data Asụsụ na Omenala Afrịka
datastewardship.description: Anyị na-eso obodo dị iche iche ede, lekọta, ma chekwaa asụsụ na omenaala Afrịka n'ụzọ na-asọpụrụ iwu ime obodo, akụkọ ihe mere eme, na ihe kachasị mkpa. Ọrụ anyị gụnyere:
items: Asụsụ a na-ekwu okwu na omenaala ọnụ
Omenala a na-ahụ anya na omume kwa ụbọchị
Ide ihe nketa omenala
Ide asụsụ dị iche iche n'ofe ebe Afrịka

aiDataCollection.title: Nchịkọta Data AI Lekwasịrị Anya n'Obodo
aiDataCollection.description: Magical Africa na-emepụta ma na-edu usoro nchịkọta data nke omume ọma nke obodo na-eme nke na-akwado mmepe AI gụnyere asụsụ Afrịka. Anyị na-elekwasị anya na:
items: Olu, ederede, na data ụdị dị iche iche
Ebe ojiji n'ezie (agụmakwụkwọ, omenala, ịzụ ndụ)
Ịsonye ziri ezi na ịkwụ ụgwọ
Nlekọta data doro anya

education.title: Ọrụ Agụmakwụkwọ na Ihe Ọmụma Omenala
education.description: Anyị na-arụ ọrụ n'ụlọ akwụkwọ, ebe mmụta, na ebe omenala n'ofe mpaghara Afrịka dị iche iche iji kwado mmụta asụsụ, nyefee ihe ọmụma, na mgbanwe n'etiti ọgbọ. Anyị na-elekwasị anya na:
items: Gburugburu mmụta asụsụ dị iche iche
Ihe ọmụma ọnụ na akụkọ
Mmemme na omenaala omenala
Itinye aka nke ụmụ okorobịa na ngosipụta

principles.title: Ụkpụrụ Anyị
items: Pan-African site na nhazi - Guzosie ike n'ime obodo, jikọọ kọntinent niile
Obodo Bụ Ụzọ - Obodo bụ ndị mmekọ, ọ bụghị ebe a na-enweta data
Omume Ọma site na Mmalite - Nkwenye, ikwu eziokwu, na nzuzo abụghị ihe a ga-akparịta ụka
Ịsọpụrụ Omenala - Asụsụ na omenala bụ sistemụ dị ndụ
Mmepe na Mmekọrịta - Anyị na-akwado ihe ọmụma mepere emepe na mmụta ọnụ
AI Lekwasịrị Anya na Mmadụ - Teknụzụ ga-ejere ndị mmadụ ozi, ọ bụghị iwepụ n'aka ha

preparingData.title: Ịkwadebe Data maka AI Gụnyere Mmadụ Niile
items: Nchọpụta okwu (ASR)
Ederede-ka-olu (TTS)
Ngwá ọrụ mmụta dabere na olu
Ngwa agụmakwụkwọ na omenala ụdị dị iche iche

research.title: Nchọpụta na Nyocha Ogo Enyere Aka AI
items: Nyere aka na usoro ide na nkọwa
Chọpụta oghere na nnọchite anya asụsụ
Kwado nyocha ogo mgbe niile jikọtara na nkwenye mmadụ

communityTools.title: Ngwá Ọrụ Nke Obodo Na-akwado
items: Akụrụngwa mmụta nke AI kwadoro
Ngwá ọrụ agụmakwụkwọ dabere na olu na ụdị dị iche iche
Ikpo okwu ide omenala

partners.title: Ndị Anyị Na-arụkọ Ọrụ
partners.description: Anyị na-arụkọ ọrụ n'ofe Afrịka na

team.title: Ndị Isi Otu Anyị
team.description: Uche nwere mmasị n'azụ Magical Africa

gloria.name: Gloria Machoka
gloria.bio: Ọkachamara n’asụsụ Kisii na-elekwasị anya n’akụkọ ifo, asụsụ nna ochie, na imezi ntorobịa.

steve.name: Steve Kombo
steve.bio: Ọkachamara n’asụsụ Kisii na-elekwasị anya n’ichekwaa akụkọ ọdịnala na omenala site na mmụta na teknụzụ.

joel.name: Joel Makori
joel.bio: Ọkachamara n’asụsụ Luo na-elekwasị anya n’iji asụsụ ziri ezi na akụkọ ọdịnala obodo.

Edewait.name: Edewait Eric
Edewait.bio: Ọkachamara n’asụsụ Teso na-elekwasị anya n’ichekwaa okwu, ilu, na omenala nna ochie.

lorna.name: Lorna Wanderi
lorna.bio: Ọkachamara n’asụsụ Kikuyu nke na-elekwasị anya n’ilu, akụkọ ifo, na ezi asụsụ.

ian.name: Ian Cheruiyot
ian.bio: Ọkachamara n’asụsụ Kalenjin na-elekwasị anya n’ichekwaa asụsụ, akụkọ ọdịnala, na njirimara omenala.

collins.name: Collins Omondi
collins.bio: Ọkachamara n’asụsụ Luo na-akwado idekọ asụsụ, akụkọ, na njirimara omenala.

cta.title: Sonyere Anyị Ịchekwa Akụkọ Afrịka N'ezie
cta.description: Afrịka achọghị ka ndị ọzọ kọwaa ya. Anyị ga-akọ akụkọ anyị n'onwe anyị n'ùgwù, izi ezi, okike, na mpako.

phrases.title: Okwu Amamihe
phrases.description: Okwu na-egosi na ịchọ ịma ihe, mgbe a na-adịghị achịkwa ya, nwere ike iduba mmadụ n'ọnọdụ dị ize ndụ.
phrases.teaching: Ụfọdụ ajụjụ ma ọ bụ omume nwere ike iweta nsogbu.

music.title: Egwu Omenala
music.intro: Egwu Afrika bụ otu n'ime omenala egwu kacha ochie n'ụwa, nke ejikọtara n'ime ndụ obodo site na emume, mmemme, ịkọ akụkọ, ịgba egwu, na omume ime mmụọ.

events.title: Emume Omenala
events.intro: Emume omenala Afrika na-eme ememe ihe nketa site n'ijikọ obodo ọnụ site na egwu, ịgba egwu, nka, nri, na ịkọ akụkọ, na-asọpụrụ omenala ebe ha na-anabata njirimara Afrika nke oge a.
events.festivalDescription: Emume izu ụka gosipụtara ihe ngosi ịgba egwu omenala, okirikiri ịgba egwu, ihe ngosi nka, na nri Afrika ezigbo sitere na kọntinent dum.

popularCourses.title: Usoro anyị
popularCourses.subtitle: Chọpụta ọtụtụ usoro nke ndị nkuzi Africa na-akụzi na ọchịchọ — site na ọrụ omenala gaa na nka omenala, enwere ihe maka onye ọ bụla.

culture.description: Emume omenala Africa na-eme ihe mgbaru ọsọ nke ihe nketa site n'iziko obodo site na egwu, ịgba ọgọ, nka, nri, na ịkọ akụkọ — na-asọpụrụ omenala mgbe na-anabata ịdị onwe onye Africa ọhụrụ.

hero.description: Site na ihe ndị a na-atọ ọnụ ahịa gaa na ngwá ọrụ aka nke ndị ọrụ aka ndị mpaghara — nweta mpịakọta nke omenala dị ndụ nke kọntinent.

bestSellers.title: Ihe Ndị A Na-ere Kachasị
bestSellers.subtitle: Ihe ndị a họpụtara site n'izụ bara ọnụ n'ofe kọntinent

shop.title: Zụta Nchịkọta
shop.subtitle: Ihe ndị ezigbo eziokwu nke ndị ọrụ aka mpaghara mere n'ofe kọntinent

auctions.title: Ahịa Dị Ndụ
auctions.subtitle: Tụọ ọnụ n'ihe nka Africa dị ọnụ, ịchọ mma, na ihe omenala

item1.name: Ihe Anọdụ Ọchịchọ Ọdọ Ọhụrụ nke Benin nke Narị Afọ nke 19
item1.description: Ihe anọdụ ọchịchọ ọdọ ọhụrụ sitere n'Alaeze Benin, na-egosi dike eze n'ọchịchọ. Ebumnuche ejiri enyocha.

item2.name: Ihe Isi Ememe nke Alaeze Kuba
item2.description: Ihe isi ịchụ arụsị nke etinyere aka na ọcha sitere na Democratic Republic of Congo.

item3.name: Oud Ochie nke Swahili Taarab
item3.description: Oud nke etinyere aka nke narị afọ nke 19 sitere n'ụsọ oyi nke Swahili, nwere ọrụ dị mma.

artisans.title: Ndị Ọrụ Aka A Họpụtara
artisans.subtitle: Ndị mmadụ ezigbo, ọrụ aka ezigbo — ịzụta ọ bụla na-akwado onye ọrụ aka mpaghara ozugbo

newsletter.title: Ghara Ịhapụ Ihe Ọ Bụla
newsletter.subtitle: Nweta ọkwa mgbe ndị ọrụ aka ọhụrụ depụtara ihe na mgbe ahịa ndị dị ndụ amalite

hero.description: Site na emume igwe ilu na Sahel gaa n'abalị masquerade na Lagos - banye n'ọkụ nke ndụ nke kọntinent

byMonth.title: Chọta Emume site na Ọnwa
byMonth.subtitle: Tụlee emume omenala Africa na-eme n'ọgwụgwụ afọ
byMonth.selectPrompt: 👆 Họrọ ọnwa dị n'elu iji hụ emume

event1.name: Emume Bushfire
event1.description: Ọchịchọ pụrụ iche nke ndị nka na ndị na-egwu egwu Africa n'Alaeze Eswatini. Egwu, ịkọ akụkọ, na mmụọ obodo n'otu ọnọdụ ugwu.

event2.name: Emume Odwira
event2.description: Ndị Ashanti nke Ghana na-asacha ochere ha ma na-asọpụrụ ndị nna ha n'emume izu ọchịchọ a jupụtara na njem, ịgba ọgọ, igwe ilu, ịhụ uri na oriri.

hero.subtitle: Site na ụda ochie nke djembe ruo ọ dị ugbu a nke Afrobeats na Amapiano — chọpụta ụda ndị gbanwere ụwa.

explore.title: Chọpụta
explore.subtitle: Chọpụta ụda Afrika, ndị ọrụ egwu, ngwa egwu na mmetụta ụwa
explore.keyArtists: Ndị Ọrụ Egwu Ndị Bụ Isi:

genre1.location: Nigeria na Ghana — Afrika Ọdịda Anyanwụ
genre1.name: Afrobeats
genre1.description: Ihe nke ụwa niile na-ejikọta highlife, funk, na hip-hop. Amụọ na Lagos, Afrobeats aghọwo otu n'ime ike egwu kacha ike n'ụwa — ụda na-aso na-ejide ọchịchọ ndị bi ụwa site na Nairobi ruo New York.
genre1.artists: Burna Boy, Wizkid, Davido, Tems, Omah Lay

genre2.name: Amapiano
genre2.description: Ngwakọta dị mma nke deep house, jazz, na ịkụ igwe nke akụ. Amụọ na ụlọ ndị bi na Soweto, Amapiano agbasapụla ala nile ma ugbu a na-achị chart ụwa na ihe nkesa egwu.
genre2.artists: Kabza De Small, DJ Maphorisa, Tyler ICU, Focalistic

genre3.name: Benga
genre3.description: Ụdị egwu nke Kenya — ụda gitaa dị ike nke e dere n'elu egwu omenala Luo. Benga bụ ntọala nke egwu a ma ama nke Kenya na otu n'ime ụda pụrụ iche nke Afrika Ọwụwa Anyanwụ.
genre3.artists: D.O. Misiani, Ochieng Kabaselleh, Victoria Kings

genre4.name: Highlife
genre4.description: Otu n'ime ụdị egwu oge a ochie nke Afrika, na-agwakọta ụda bendi ọlaọcha na ụda ndị Ghana. Dị mkpa, dị mma, na nke na-adịgide adịgide — ụdị nke tọọ ntọala ọtụtụ nke egwu Afrika Ọdịda Anyanwụ.
genre4.artists: E.T. Mensah, Amakye Dede, Daddy Lumba

instruments.title: Ngwa Egwu
instruments.subtitle: Ngwa ochie nke ụda na-ebu ọtụtụ narị afọ nke omenala na akụkọ ifo

kora.name: Kora
kora.description: Harp-lute nwere eriri iri abụọ na otu si na Afrika Ọdịda Anyanwụ. Ngwa egwu nke griots — ndị na-akọ akụkọ na ndị ọkà mmụta ihe gara aga.

djembe.name: Djembe
djembe.description: Igwe ịkụ igwe a ma ama n'ụwa nke si na Guinea. Dị mkpa n'ọchichi na ọchịchọ ndị obodo.

mbira.name: Mbira
mbira.description: Piano mkpịsị aka nke Zimbabwe — ngwa egwu ime mmụọ a na-eji ịkparịta ụka na ndị nna ochie.

talkingDrum.name: Igwe Ikwu Okwu
talkingDrum.description: Igwe ịkụ igwe dị ka ọchịchọ awa na-nacho asụsụ ụdaolu, a na-eji ya maka nkwukọrịta ogologo ụzọ.

krar.name: Krar
krar.description: Lyre nwere eriri ise si na Ethiopia na Eritrea nwere ụda dị mma njikọ na omenala ochie.

balafon.name: Balafon
balafon.description: Xylophone osisi a hụrụ n'anya n'oge Mali, Senegal, na Côte d'Ivoire.

artists.title: Ndị Ọrụ Egwu
artists.subtitle: Ndị ama ama na kpakpando ndị ọhụrụ si na kọntịnent nile

artist1.description: Nna nke Afrobeat. Egwu ya bụ ihe mgbanwe, nke ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchọ, na nke na-adịgide adịgide.

artist2.description: "Mama Afrika" — olu mara mma na nke ọgọ nke ụwa nile nụrụ.

artist3.description: Onye nwụnye Grammy zoputara Afrobeats n'ụwa nile.

artist4.description: Olu na-akọwara ọgbọ na-agwakọta soul, R&B, na Afrobeats.

artist5.description: Gosipụtara njikọ dị omimi dị n'etiti egwu Afrika Ọdịda Anyanwụ na blues Amerika.

artist6.description: Otu n'ime olu ndị a kọọrọ ọtụtụ mma n'Afrika, na-agwakọta ọdịnala Wolof na ụda ụwa.

artist7.description: Gosipụtara njikọ dị omimi dị n'etiti egwu Afrika Ọdịda Anyanwụ na blues Amerika.

influence.title: Mmetụta
influence.subtitle: Otu ụda Afrika si agbanwe egwu ụwa nile na-ege ntị

jazz.name: Jazz & Blues
jazz.description: Ọkọlọtọ pentatonic, ihe omume nke oku na nzaghachi, na mgbagwoju ụda nke egwu Afrika bụ isi nna nke Jazz na Blues.

reggae.name: Reggae
reggae.description: Reggae Jamaica na-ebu ihe nketa nke ụda Afrika site na diaspora, na Rastafari mejupụtara n'omenala Ethiopia.

hiphop.name: Hip-Hop
hiphop.description: Omenala griot nke okwu ọnụ, ịkọ akụkọ, na oku na nzaghachi a na-ahụ n'ọnụ ọgụgụ dị ka isi nna ime mmụọ nke hip-hop.

electronic.name: Egwu Electronic
electronic.description: Site na Amapiano ruo Afrobeats, usoro ụda Afrika na-agbanwe omenala klọb ụwa na mmepụta pop buru ibu.
